subject: Gloom, a drooping flower-headed creature in a meadow
description: A small round blue-bodied creature with a large, wilting flower-like head stands in a bright meadow. The figure has large vacant or half-closed eyes, a perpetual downturned expression, and a red-and-white flower growing from its head with petals drooping around its face. Pink and red flowering plants surround it at ground level, and the background opens into a sunny blue sky with white clouds. The posture is listless or drowsy despite the cheerful surroundings. The palette is vivid with blues, pinks, reds, and white.
foreground: blue round creature with drooping flower-head, surrounded by small pink flowers
background: sunny meadow with blue sky and white clouds
